nasb.text: with three layers of huge stones and one layer of timbers. And let the cost be paid from the royal treasury.

esv.text: with three layers of great stones and one layer of timber. Let the cost be paid from the royal treasury.

cnv.text: 三層光滑石塊，一層新木頭，所有費用由王庫支付。

ccb.text: 每三层巨石加铺一层木料，经费由国库支付。
